title: Overlapped Result
description: Returns whether found objects overlap each other.
notes: Returns whether found objects overlap each other. Overlapping will be found based on overlapping of model windows. When NumberToFind is set to 2 or larger value and some work pieces are found, the result whether the work pieces overlap each other will be returned.
see_also:
Applies To

Vision Objects: Geometric

NumberToFind Property

RejectOnEdge Property

Vision Objects: Overlapped Result
